Rose of Firiona  
 

Quest Item
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Rose of Firiona
Quest Item
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 7 sp 5 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 05:45:56
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 15pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Quests | Comments ]
This item is found by foraging.

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Burning Woods
Quest Name
Druid Epic: Nature Walker's Scimitar
Ranger Epic: Swiftwind and Earthcaller

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Firiona Vie


Uploaded January 24th, 2021 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Rose of Firiona
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2010 at 3:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600042768867
15 posts
Perhaps it is random...I sat at the POK book for some time and didn't get the rose only water, rabbit meat etc...lvl 95 forage, finally picked one up out east by Allerina the Gentle.
▲ Page top
First Try
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2009 at 6:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591960015261
6 posts


Zoned in .....Clicked forage.... Boom rose...lol Lucky I guess. I suggest if your forage is not up to par ask someone with high forage to help....I mean the worst they can say is NO!!...Then they wouldn't be nice would they??? good luck yall



Rose of Firiona
Half-Elf Ranger 74
<Silver Daggers>
The Rathe
▲ Page top
dang
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2006 at 2:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591898843225
1 post
Ok, is there a specific skill level you need to be? I just spent 3 hours with freagin 3 different charaters doing nothing but foraging in Firiona Vie. One with about 50ish forage, one in the 90s and one about 60something forage. 3 hours, countless attempts to forage and nothing but food, lichenclover and a few drachnid silks. What the heck. I was able to forage the other 4 things for the ranger epic in a matter of minutes.
▲ Page top
dang
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2008 at 5:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591951138463
7 posts
Oh the irony! If you weren't convinced before, then be convinced now.

I spent an hour in Firiona Vie foraging for this rose before i got it. Later when i was passing through to go to frontier mountains i was hitting forage for fun and on the first TWO forages i recieved additional Roses of Firiona. Wethere this is SOE's idea of a cruel joke or just an evil random number generator i have no idea. This is totally random. So random, in fact, that it hurts!
▲ Page top
dang
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2007 at 3:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341468767
19 posts
This is purely random 5 tries in less than 15 mins at skill 34. Good luck I actually got it looking down on the cliff golems.
▲ Page top
dang
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2021 at 8:31 PM Rating: Decent
wizen
Scholar
36 posts
This is the correct response. I just got one at 50 foraging.
▲ Page top
dang
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2006 at 11:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1699229791121
Scholar
75 posts
xanontz wrote:
Ok, is there a specific skill level you need to be? I just spent 3 hours with freagin 3 different charaters doing nothing but foraging in Firiona Vie. One with about 50ish forage, one in the 90s and one about 60something forage. 3 hours, countless attempts to forage and nothing but food, lichenclover and a few drachnid silks. What the heck. I was able to forage the other 4 things for the ranger epic in a matter of minutes.


Kunark just opened today on The Sleeper progression server, zoned into FV as a 24 druid with 123 forage, and it was the first thing I picked up. So maybe 100+ forage, maybe luck of the draw, I dunno. Then again, I got the GFay epic forage piece with 5 minutes of creating this character, so I don't think there's a minimum level/skill requirement for any of them.

dang
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2009 at 8:07 PM Rating: Decent

171 posts
I believe its random too.. spent 30-45mins getting water / food and then all of a sudden I got 2 roses on 1 click.. forage skill is at 175

worth
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2005 at 8:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Rose of Firiona Sells for 0 plat 0 gold 7 silver 1 copper at vendor Sateal Deirosap in the bazaar (human Monk level 2 charisma 141). I sell these in bazaar for 15 plat...sell slow... forage in Firiona Vie...

Edited, Mon Sep 19 22:02:27 2005
▲ Page top
Looks like this may be time based
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2005 at 1:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592269501712
Scholar
38 posts
Was in DL this morning to forage for alchemy and noticed the following- prior to 10 am pst, no roses (had been foraging for about 8 hours prior). Ran out to get a rez (someone trained while I was afk <G>), came back and foraged 3 in a row, around 10:15-10:30, 3 am game time.
▲ Page top
Gimme a Break!
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2005 at 6:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760884662
14 posts
I've been roming FV for a few hours now (really a few hours, not ove a few hrs, etc...). I haven't found 1 single rose yet, so I'd say the drop is pretty rare! Really starting to irk me.

# Aug 29 2005 at 2:10 PM Rating: Decent

Sorry to hear that. I have pretty much always got one just passing through the zone. Sometimes they sell in the Bazaar for 10p or so.

its taken me a while.................... still nothing if yo

# Dec 08 2004 at 7:13 PM Rating: Default

▲ Page top
Where to Forage This
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2004 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751504276
Scholar
73 posts
Right by the PoK Book, in the tunnels.

Tried all over the zone, but best results were right as you zone in from PoK.

Had to forage two and got both with 45 minutes there.

Good Luck!
▲ Page top
RE: Where to Forage This
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2005 at 2:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251646135
Scholar
44 posts
Location in a zone has ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to do with success rates. Forage wherever you like, you will eventually get what you need. Every post I have read saying "you can only get this item over here" I have ended disproving by being patient.
▲ Page top
Where to Forage This

Had to forage two and got both within 45 minutes there.

Good Luck!

I don't know if the rate for finding this item is different for different servers, but I forage this item all the time when I'm in FV.

Rare forage for druid epic
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 2:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361483315
20 posts
Also a rare forage for the druid Epic. I sugest selling it to druids and or rangers if you find it. It would save them tons of time.

▲ Page top
RE: Rare forage for druid epic
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2003 at 1:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953023551
99 posts
"Rare" depends on how long you're there. I was there in FV for four days (probably about 15 hours of real time) questing for Wurmslayer. With 130ish ranks of Forage, I ended up with, oh, about 8-10 roses. I started throwing them on the ground after the fifth one, so I'm not exactly sure how many I ended up foraging. Spend enough time there, and you'll get one.


Grethic Crescentleaf
Halfling Ranger 26
<Valor Knights>
Vazaelle
